items.name: Anthropic
items.blurb: AI safety company developing the Claude family of models with strong AI research hiring.

items.name: OpenAI
items.blurb: Creator of GPT and ChatGPT hiring researchers and engineers across safety, models, and products.

items.name: DeepMind
items.blurb: Google DeepMind researches AGI and publishes widely; hiring spans research science and engineering.

items.name: Hugging Face
items.blurb: ML platform and model hub company hiring ML engineers, researchers, and developer advocates.

items.name: Mistral AI
items.blurb: Paris-based frontier model company releasing open-weight models and hiring research talent.

items.name: Cohere
items.blurb: Enterprise AI platform for language models and RAG, actively hiring ML and platform engineers.

items.name: Scale AI
items.blurb: AI data infrastructure company providing training data and evaluation services at enterprise scale.

items.name: Databricks
items.blurb: Data lakehouse platform company with strong ML and AI hiring across engineering and research.

items.name: NVIDIA
items.blurb: GPU and accelerated computing company central to AI infrastructure, hiring broadly in AI/ML.

items.name: Weights & Biases
items.blurb: ML experiment tracking and model management platform hiring ML engineers and developer advocates.

items.name: Runway
items.blurb: Generative video and creative AI company hiring ML researchers and applied AI engineers.

items.name: Perplexity AI
items.blurb: AI-powered answer engine actively hiring across ML engineering, research, and product roles.

items.name: Together AI
items.blurb: Cloud platform for running and fine-tuning open-source models, hiring ML and systems engineers.

items.name: Stability AI
items.blurb: Developer of Stable Diffusion and other open generative models across image, audio, and language.

items.name: Midjourney
items.blurb: Independent AI image generation research lab with selective hiring in ML research and engineering.
